script: for i in $(seq 1 90); do if [ -f scripts/app-feedback/parse-feedback.mjs ] && [ -f scripts/app-feedback/apply-feedback-enhancement.mjs ] && [ -f 'feedback/consumer-radar-product-feedback.md' ]; then echo feedback-support-ready; exit 0; fi; sleep 2; done; echo 'missing feedback enhancement support files' >&2; exit 1
command:
exec 2>&1
for i in $(seq 1 90); do if [ -f scripts/app-feedback/parse-feedback.mjs ] && [ -f scripts/app-feedback/apply-feedback-enhancement.mjs ] && [ -f 'feedback/consumer-radar-product-feedback.md' ]; then echo feedback-support-ready; exit 0; fi; sleep 2; done; echo 'missing feedback enhancement support files' >&2; exit 1
